title: Add RCA validity tests and failure-mode coverage
description:
## Summary
Add tests and failure-mode coverage for RCA validity in feedback-backed evaluations.

## Deliverables
- Cover zero incorrect items, small incorrect sets, clustered incorrect sets, persistence failures, and backend exceptions.
- Ensure missing RCA with incorrect items is caught as a failure.
- Make RCA validity part of normal evaluation test coverage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting targeted RCA validity tests for small incorrect-set path and missing-data edge cases.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added RCA validity tests for small incorrect-set handling: (1) delegates to small-set RCA path for <5 candidates, (2) returns empty payload when no candidates. Keeping task open for additional failure-mode scenarios beyond these new cases.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating missing RCA persistence: latest feedback evaluation 1713f6f1-c61a-46cc-891b-6c86412cf9c3 reached processed=total but remained RUNNING with no root_cause visible. Suspected cause: dashboard Evaluation.update uses daemon background thread; terminal COMPLETED/parameters updates can be dropped on process exit. Implementing blocking update path now and validating with targeted tests + real run.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed root cause of intermittent 'Analyzing finished but no RCA/terminal status' symptom: Evaluation.update performed writes on daemon thread, so terminal updates could be dropped if process exited promptly. Implemented synchronous durable update in Evaluation model and updated evaluation model tests accordingly. Note: previously reported run 1713f6f1-c61a-46cc-891b-6c86412cf9c3 now shows COMPLETED with RCA payload present.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented task-stage reliability fix for feedback/accuracy-with-feedback evaluations launched via MCP runner: runner now provisions a real Task + stages (or validates explicit existing task), MCP background dispatch uses that real task ID, and evaluate feedback version-path always attaches a TaskProgressTracker even when --task-id is provided so stages are advanced/completed. Added tests for task provisioning and reran runner/reference-dataset suites.
